domain: Velvet ant 5-layer high-cost aposematic defense — escalating defense stack (color → stridulation → alarm secretion → exoskeleton → sting) with each layer more costly; sting reserved as last resort.
specific_mechanism: Cost-escalating cascade of defenses with cheap deterrents at the surface and rare high-cost last resort.
llm_application: MULTILAYER-DETERRENT-EVAL: 5-layer escalating evaluation cascade — (1) cheap regex/keyword surface check (aposematic color), (2) small classifier (stridulation), (3) embedding-similarity rule (alarm secretion), (4) mid-size judge model (exoskeleton), (5) frontier LLM-as-judge with adversarial probing (sting/last resort). High-cost levels are rare. Total cost minimized by surface deflection.
novelty_claim: LLM-as-Judge / multi-agent debate / judge-reliability literature studies cost-reliability tradeoff. MULTILAYER-DETERRENT-EVAL's distinctive contribution is EXPLICIT 5-LAYER COST-ESCALATING cascade matched to velvet-ant defense topology with cheap-aposematic surface deflection and rare frontier-judge last resort.
